name: songle-relay
tagline: Reliable Relay Solutions for Industrial and Consumer Applications
description: beiluo is a leading manufacturer of electromechanical relays, solid state relays, and automotive relays. Established in 1986, beiluo provides reliable switching solutions for industrial control, home appliances, automotive, and telecommunications applications.
longDescription: beiluo, founded in 1986 and headquartered in Ningbo, China, is a professional manufacturer specializing in relay products. With over 35 years of experience, beiluo has become one of the largest relay manufacturers in China, producing more than 800 million relays annually. The company offers comprehensive relay solutions including power relays, signal relays, automotive relays, and solid state relays. beiluo products are widely used in industrial automation, home appliances, HVAC systems, automotive electronics, and telecommunications equipment. All products are certified with UL, CSA, VDE, TUV, and CQC, ensuring global quality standards. As an authorized distributor, BeiLuo Electronics provides genuine beiluo relays with technical support and competitive pricing.

coreProducts.name: Power Relays
coreProducts.description: High-capacity electromechanical relays for industrial and appliance applications with ratings up to 30A

coreProducts.name: Signal Relays
coreProducts.description: Compact low-power relays for telecommunications and control circuits with high sensitivity

coreProducts.name: Automotive Relays
coreProducts.description: Automotive-grade relays designed for vehicle electrical systems with high vibration resistance

coreProducts.name: Solid State Relays
coreProducts.description: Semiconductor-based relays offering long life and silent operation for industrial control

industries.description: Control systems, PLCs, and machinery automation requiring reliable switching

industries.name: Automotive Electronics

industries.name: Telecommunications

seoTitle: beiluo Relay Distributor | Power, Signal, Automotive Relays
seoDescription: Authorized distributor of beiluo relays including power relays, signal relays, automotive relays, and solid state relays. Technical support and selection guide available.

faqs.question: Is BeiLuo an authorized distributor of beiluo relays?
faqs.answer: Yes, BeiLuo Electronics is an authorized distributor of beiluo products. We provide genuine beiluo relays with full factory warranty, technical support, and competitive pricing. Our partnership with beiluo ensures you receive authentic products directly from the manufacturer.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact us to verify our distributor status and discuss your relay requirements.

faqs.question: What types of relays does beiluo manufacture?
faqs.answer: beiluo manufactures a comprehensive range of relay products including power relays (up to 30A), signal relays for telecommunications, automotive relays for vehicle applications, and solid state relays for industrial control. Each product line offers multiple series with various contact configurations, coil voltages, and mounting options to meet diverse application requirements.
faqs.decisionGuide: Browse our product categories to find the right relay type for your application.

faqs.question: What certifications do beiluo relays have?
faqs.answer: beiluo relays carry major international certifications including UL (North America), VDE (Germany), TUV (Europe), and CQC (China). These certifications ensure compliance with safety standards in major markets worldwide. All products also meet RoHS requirements for environmental compliance.
faqs.decisionGuide: Verify required certifications for your target markets. Contact us for certification documentation.

faqs.question: What industries use beiluo relays?
faqs.answer: beiluo relays are used across multiple industries including industrial automation, home appliances, automotive electronics, and telecommunications. Specific applications include PLC control systems, washing machines, refrigerators, vehicle lighting and HVAC, and telecom switching equipment.
faqs.decisionGuide: Explore our solutions pages to see how beiluo relays are applied in your industry.

faqs.question: How do I select the right beiluo relay for my application?
faqs.answer: Selecting the right relay requires considering several factors: contact rating (current and voltage), coil voltage, contact configuration (SPST, SPDT, DPDT), mounting type (PCB, panel, socket), and environmental requirements. Our technical support team can help you select the optimal relay based on your specific application parameters.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our FAE team for relay selection assistance or browse our selection guides.

faqs.question: What is the typical lead time for beiluo relays?
faqs.answer: Standard beiluo relays typically ship within 2-4 weeks from order confirmation. Popular series are stocked for faster delivery. For large volume orders or custom specifications, lead times may vary. Contact our sales team for current stock status and delivery schedules.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact sales for current lead times and stock availability.

faqs.question: Does beiluo provide custom relay solutions?
faqs.answer: Yes, beiluo offers customization services for specific application requirements including special coil voltages, contact materials, terminal configurations, and packaging. Custom development requires minimum order quantities and additional lead time. Contact us to discuss your custom relay
